title: The 26 Year Old Prodigy Reverse Engineering UFOs (Ft. Deep Prasad)
summary: Deep Prasad, a 26-year-old quantum computing entrepreneur, discusses his startup Quantum Generative Materials which aims to reverse engineer UAP materials using quantum computers. The conversation explores how quantum mechanics might explain the five observable properties of UFOs, the limitations of classical computing for material simulation, and the potential intersection of quantum sensing with consciousness and biological systems.
